docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,375.00 FILED BY EKSHENGER, ILIA AS TO DEFENDANT IVANOV, IVAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50.00) SERVED AUG-14-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IVANOV, IVAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-20-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-20-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ILIA EKSHENGER IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED RUSSIAN INTERPRETER TATAONIA ICONIA. DEFENDANT IVAN IVANOV IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EKSHENGER, ILIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT IVANOV, IVAN DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR JUDGMENT IS NUNC PRO TUNC TO 9/20/21 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
